title: Dataset
description: Portable dataset format for agent evaluation (§11.6 optional extension). A dataset groups many example inputs for driving evaluations of an agent. Implementations MAY import from OpenAI Evals, HuggingFace, LangSmith, or Braintrust formats, but conforming datasets land in this shape.

id.description: Stable identifier for this dataset. SHOULD be globally unique within its publishing scope.

version.description: Semver-style monotonic version string. Tools MAY diff across versions; the spec does not mandate diff semantics.

description.description: Brief description of what the dataset covers and its intended use.

agentId.description: When present, the dataset is intended for this specific agent. Example inputs MUST validate against the agent's inputSchema (AEP-REQ-074).

evaluator.description: When the dataset is calibrated for a named RAI evaluator (e.g. 'harmful_content', 'hallucination'), record it here.

policyProfileRef.description: Reference to a PolicyProfile (§11.1) that this dataset is designed to exercise. Enables 'which datasets cover this rule set' queries.

sourceRef.description: Provenance pointer to the upstream source: HuggingFace slug (e.g. 'hf:truthful_qa'), OpenAI Evals path, internal ticket, git URL, etc. Required when imported from a foreign format (AEP-REQ-078).

tags.description: Freeform tags for filtering and discovery (e.g. 'safety', 'summarisation', 'english').

license.description: SPDX license identifier or a free-form license notice for the dataset contents.

metadata.description: Arbitrary dataset-level metadata. Vendor-specific fields SHOULD use reverse-DNS prefixes.

id.description: Stable identifier for this example within the dataset.

input.description: The input to submit to the agent. When the dataset declares agentId, this MUST validate against the agent's inputSchema (AEP-REQ-074).

expected.description: Optional reference answer for reference-aware grading. Shape is dataset-specific; tools interpreting this field SHOULD match it to the agent's outputSchema when possible.

references.description: Optional multiple acceptable references, for reference-aware judging that accepts variant correct answers.

context.description: Optional per-example context to inject via the agent's contextModel. Keys SHOULD match declared injection points.
